steps.title: Connect value to protection
steps.content: The site's presence on UNESCO's World Heritage List indicates that UNESCO has acknowledged its "outstanding universal value." That acknowledgment explains why UNESCO is championing the site's preservation and protection.

steps.title: Avoid negative actions
steps.content: A would mean UNESCO took advantage of the site, C would mean it blocked the site, and D would mean it ignored the site. Those meanings clash with preservation and protection. The needed word means acknowledged or identified the site's value. The answer is B.
